Class IuConnectionPool

java.lang.Object
edu.iu.jdbc.pool.IuConnectionPool
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable, EventListener, ConnectionEventListener
public class IuConnectionPool extends Object implements ConnectionEventListener, AutoCloseable
Basic database connection pool utility.

    Description

    Waits for completion and closes all open connections.

    Attempts to remove this as ConnectionEventListener then closes a PooledConnection.

  • Constructor Details

    • IuConnectionPool

      public IuConnectionPool(IuPooledConnectionFactory factory, IuConnectionPoolConfiguration config)
      Default constructor.
      Parameters:
      factory - IuPooledConnectionFactory
      config - IuConnectionPoolConfiguration

  • Method Details

    • closePooledConnection

      void closePooledConnection(PooledConnection pooledConnection) throws SQLException
      Attempts to remove this as ConnectionEventListener then closes a PooledConnection.
      Parameters:
      pooledConnection - PooledConnection
      Throws:
      SQLException - if an error occurs

    • checkOut

      public PooledConnection checkOut() throws SQLException
      Checks out a PooledConnection.
      Returns:
      PooledConnection
      Throws:
      SQLException - if the connection fails due to a database error

    • reuseOrClose

      protected void reuseOrClose(PooledConnection pooledConnection) throws SQLException
      Indicates that a PooledConnection is no longer in use by the application and may potentially be reused.
      Parameters:
      pooledConnection - PooledConnection obtained from checkOut()
      Throws:
      SQLException - if an error occurs attempting to close a non-reusable connection

    • connectionClosed

      public void connectionClosed(ConnectionEvent event)
      Specified by:
      connectionClosed in interface ConnectionEventListener

    • connectionErrorOccurred

      public void connectionErrorOccurred(ConnectionEvent event)
      Specified by:
      connectionErrorOccurred in interface ConnectionEventListener

    • close

      public void close() throws SQLException
      Waits for completion and closes all open connections.
      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable
      Throws:
      SQLException

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
